title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Piramal Pharma Global Group

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Piramal Pharma Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Piramal Pharma Global Group has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Piramal Pharma Global Group:
Piramal Pharma Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Pharma Global Group!
